prompt: I'm building a Next.js 15 app and I want to integrate @angi-ai/angi from scratch. I've never used it before. My app has a contact form (name, email, message fields) and I want users to be able to say things like 'fill the name with John and email with john@example.com' and have the form fill itself. Walk me through everything I need to set up.

assertions.text: Includes a server route (app/api/angi/route.ts) using AngiAgent with processRequestStream
Shows AngiNextProvider wrapping children in the layout
Shows <Angi> boundary wrapper with id and permissions props in the page/parent
Calls useAngiComponent inside the form component with description, getState, and actions
getState includes all three fields: name, email, and message
execute functions call setState (not just describe the action)
Includes npm install command with both @angi-ai/angi and @anthropic-ai/sdk
